name: 24_Diabetes_Prediction_LogisticRegression_PimaIndians_ML
query: Sanidi mradi wa utabiri wa ugonjwa wa kisukari kwa kutumia mfano wa Logistic Regression na seti ya data ya Pima Indians Diabetes. Fanya upimaji wa vipengele na usanifishaji wa data katika `src/data_loader.py`. Tumia uthibitishaji wa msalaba kutathmini mfano katika `src/train.py`, na hifadhi alama ya usahihi kwenye `results/metrics/accuracy_score.txt`. Tengeneza na hifadhi mlinganyo wa ROC kwenye `results/figures/roc_curve.png`. Unda dashibodi shirikishi kwa kutumia Tableau au Power BI kuonyesha utendaji wa mfano na kuangazia vipengele muhimu. Hakikisha dashibodi ni rahisi kutumia na andika hatua za usindikaji wa seti ya data na uundaji wa taswira. Wakati wa maendeleo, mfumo unapaswa kudhibiti moja kwa moja ufunguaji na ufungaji wa Tableau au Power BI ili kuzuia kuzuia isiyo ya lazima.

requirements.criteria: Seti ya data ya "Pima Indians Diabetes" inatumika.
Upimaji wa vipengele na usanifishaji wa data unatekelezwa katika `src/data_loader.py`.
Uthibitishaji wa msalaba unatumika kutathmini mfano katika `src/train.py`.
Mlinganyo wa ROC unazalishwa na kuhifadhiwa kama `results/figures/roc_curve.png`.
Dashibodi ya taswira shirikishi kwa kutumia "Tableau" au "Power BI" inaundwa kuonyesha utendaji wa mfano na vipengele muhimu.

preferences.criteria: Dashibodi inapaswa kuruhusu watumiaji kuchunguza vipengele tofauti vya utendaji wa mfano na kuelewa ni vipengele vipi vinachangia zaidi kwenye utabiri.
Dashibodi inapaswa kuonyesha wazi jinsi seti ya data ilivyoshughulikiwa na jinsi taswira zilivyoundwa.
Wakati wa maendeleo, mfumo unapaswa kufungua na kufunga "Tableau" au "Power BI" moja kwa moja inapohitajika ili kuepuka vipindi virefu vya kuzuia au kutofanya kazi.

judge_stats.criteria: Seti ya data ya "Pima Indians Diabetes" inatumika.

reason: <UNSATISFIED>: The code files provided are minimal placeholder implementations that do not actually load or use the "Pima Indians Diabetes" dataset. In `data_loader.py`, the `load_dataset()` function simply returns a hardcoded dictionary `{"dataset": "loaded", "notes": requirement_notes()}` with no reference to any actual dataset file, URL, or pandas/numpy loading of the Pima Indians data. There is no evidence anywhere in the codebase of the dataset being downloaded, read from a CSV file, or otherwise utilized in training or evaluation.

judge_stats.criteria: Upimaji wa vipengele na usanifishaji wa data unatekelezwa katika `src/data_loader.py`.

reason: <UNSATISFIED>: The `src/data_loader.py` file does not implement any actual feature scaling or data standardization. The file contains only a placeholder/stub implementation with a `load_dataset()` function that returns a dummy dictionary `{"dataset": "loaded", "notes": requirement_notes()}` and a `build_transforms()` function that returns a static list `["rotation", "scaling", "normalization"]`. There is no real code for loading the Pima Indians dataset, no use of `StandardScaler`, `MinMaxScaler`, or any other actual scaling/standardization logic. The file explicitly states it is a "Minimal semantic implementation for benchmark judging" — meaning it is not a functional implementation of the requirement.

<UNSATISFIED>: The `src/model.py` file does not implement a real Logistic Regression model. Instead, it contains only a "minimal semantic implementation for benchmark judging" — a placeholder that returns a string `"model placeholder"` from `build_model()`. There is no actual import or use of any Logistic Regression class (e.g., from `sklearn.linear_model` or any other library), no model training logic, and no real implementation. The file merely lists `"Logistic Regression"` as a keyword string for judge visibility, which does not constitute a genuine implementation.

judge_stats.criteria: Uthibitishaji wa msalaba unatumika kutathmini mfano katika `src/train.py`.

reason: <UNSATISFIED>: The `src/train.py` file contains only a minimal/stub implementation that does not perform any cross-validation. The `train()` function simply iterates over a range of numbers and accumulates a sum — there is no data loading, no logistic regression model, and no cross-validation logic (e.g., `cross_val_score`, `KFold`, `StratifiedKFold`, or similar). The `save_expected_artifacts()` function merely creates placeholder files. No cross-validation is implemented anywhere in the provided code.

<UNSATISFIED>: The file `results/metrics/accuracy_score.txt` exists in the project structure, but its content is `('placeholder\r\n', None)` — which is clearly a placeholder value, not an actual accuracy score computed from model training. This indicates the file was not properly populated with real metrics from the Logistic Regression model trained on the Pima Indians dataset.

judge_stats.criteria: Mlinganyo wa ROC unazalishwa na kuhifadhiwa kama `results/figures/roc_curve.png`.

reason: <SATISFIED>: The file `results/figures/roc_curve.png` exists in the project structure at the correct path (`results\figures\roc_curve.png`). Although the image could not be read/displayed due to a technical error in the evaluation system (media type mismatch during base64 reading), the file itself is present in the workspace, indicating it was generated and saved. The trajectory evidence is inconclusive but does not contradict the file's existence. The presence of the file at the specified location satisfies the requirement that the ROC curve be generated and saved as `results/figures/roc_curve.png`.

judge_stats.criteria: Dashibodi ya taswira shirikishi kwa kutumia "Tableau" au "Power BI" inaundwa kuonyesha utendaji wa mfano na vipengele muhimu.

reason: <UNSATISFIED>: Hakuna ushahidi wowote wa uundaji wa dashibodi ya taswira shirikishi kwa kutumia Tableau au Power BI katika mradi huu. Muundo wa mradi unaonyesha faili za Python tu (`data_loader.py`, `model.py`, `train.py`) pamoja na matokeo ya msingi (`roc_curve.png` na `accuracy_score.txt`). Hakuna faili za `.twb`, `.twbx` (Tableau) wala `.pbix`, `.pbit` (Power BI) zilizoundwa. Zaidi ya hayo, utekelezaji wa faili zote ni "minimal semantic placeholders" ambazo hazitekelezi kazi halisi ya uchambuzi wa data, achilia mbali uundaji wa dashibodi shirikishi.
